name: Nacre
description: Translucent refractive mother-of-pearl cell-field — a faithful port of the Milkdrop preset `$$$ Royal - Mashup (431)`'s jello-mirror character (drifting overlapping lens-cells, chromatic-fringed rims, pulsing central core, slow palette rotation) on Phosphene's mv_warp with HDR float feedback. Its palette TRAVELS WITH THE SONG'S HARMONY: the hue is positioned on the circle of fifths (hue ← tonal_phase_fifths, the Tonal Interval Vector), so related keys land on related colours, the palette holds on a vamp and drifts on a modulation, and the same song transposed lands on shifted-but-related colours; low consonance (percussion / noise) desaturates toward a neutral rest, and silence falls back to the faithful slow time rotation. Motion is energy/structure-coupled: the molten field swirls faster as the music fills out (turning ← average stem-energy envelope), surges on the downbeat (display-stage camera push ← barPhase01); base motion routes from the continuous bands (zoom ← mid, sway ← bass, grain ← treble). See docs/presets/NACRE_PLAN.md.
author: Matt

inspired_by.original_artist: $$$ Royal mashup series (component presets by multiple Milkdrop authors)
inspired_by.source_form: butterchurn-presets built-in (pre-converted; no .milk file on disk, sha256 unavailable)
